]
for f, t in mapping:

exercises.code:
def normalize_phone(p: str) -> str:
    return "".join(c for c in p if c.isdigit())

print("H1: se pierden caracteres no dígitos incluyendo +")
exp1 = normalize_phone("+51999000111")
print("exp1", exp1, "fail_if_no_plus", not exp1.startswith("51") or "+" not in "+51999000111")
print("H2: el bug es strip de espacios solamente")
exp2 = normalize_phone(" 999 ")
print("exp2", exp2, "ok digits only")

exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints: title-case particles bug; RED then GREEN

import logging, io
buf = io.StringIO()
log = logging.getLogger("s09_demo")
log.handlers.clear()
log.setLevel(logging.INFO)
log.propagate = False
h = logging.StreamHandler(buf)
h.setFormatter(logging.Formatter("%(levelname)s %(message)s"))
log.addHandler(h)
log.info("stage=ingest event=start")
print(buf.getvalue().strip())

import logging, io

def cli_stub_good(n):
    log = logging.getLogger("cli")
    log.handlers.clear()
    log.setLevel(logging.INFO)
    log.propagate = False
    h = logging.StreamHandler()
    log.addHandler(h)
    log.info("empezando")
    log.info("sumando")
    print(f"RESULT={n + 1}")

cli_stub_good(2)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints progress to logger; RESULT to stdout

exercises.code:
def mask_email(email: str) -> str:
    local, _, domain = email.partition("@")
    return f"{(local[:1] or '*')}***@{domain}" if domain else "***"

def mask_phone(phone: str) -> str:
    digits = "".join(c for c in phone if c.isdigit())
    return "***" + digits[-4:] if len(digits) >= 4 else "***"

print(mask_email("carlos@ejemplo.pe"))
print(mask_phone("+51 988 777 666"))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints and You Do mask helpers
Hints pass id as explicit arg
